title: melaleuca penicula
intro: Melaleuca penicula, also known as the coastal tea tree, is a plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil composition. The medicinal properties of Melaleuca penicula have been found to provide health benefits such as wound healing, antimicrobial defense, and skin soothing effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil can be used topically or added to skincare products for its medicinal and cosmetic benefits.
